name: planning-scenarios
description: Representative user intents spanning the core HR domains, used to evaluate the Skill Planner's capability matching, skill selection, and execution ordering, and the Workflow Runtime's execution behavior.

cases.description: A single, narrow recruiting request that should match a small, focused plan.
cases.intent: create interview questions for a senior manager

cases.description: An onboarding request combining two related capabilities.
cases.intent: design an onboarding program and checklist

cases.description: A compensation request combining strategy and benefits capabilities.
cases.intent: develop a compensation strategy and benefits package

cases.description: A performance-management request combining a review cycle and a PIP.
cases.intent: write a performance review and a performance improvement plan

cases.description: A learning and development request for a career growth plan.
cases.intent: build a learning and development plan for career growth

cases.description: A multi-capability request spanning succession planning and talent development.
cases.intent: help with succession planning and talent development

cases.description: An offboarding request for exit process documentation.
cases.intent: create an employee offboarding and exit interview process

cases.description: A deliberately vague, non-HR request with no expected capability match — exercises the unmatched-capability path.
